channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download Q-Dir 12.51
item.description: Q-Dir is software to manage the entire file and folder on the computer, allowing to see file in same time 4 different positions (viewport quadro) while still maintaining all the standard features of the Explorer. It also provides a variety of management features, additional files included the filter file color-coding, layouts and columns can be customized, quick access to file and folder favorites and more. Other features of Q-Dir , including directory listings (.txt, .doc .html .csv),...

item.title: Download Bulk Crap Uninstaller - BCUninstaller 6.1 + Portable
item.description: BCUninstaller (Bulk Crap Uninstaller) is a software uninstallation utility, designed to ease the process of uninstalling a large number of programs with minimal effort. When you first run the application, it will show you a list of all installed programs and you have the option to select multiple uninstall candidates through checkboxes. BCUninstaller will then launch each uninstallation process, one after the other, and all you have to do is click the confirmation buttons for each...

item.description: TweakNow WinSecret Plus for Windows 11 is a program that allows users to discover hidden settings in Windows 11. This application is specially designed for Windows 11, groups many registry settings and distribute them from the easy and secure user interface. With TweakNow WinSecret Plus for Windows 11 you can move the Windows taskbar to the top and resize the taskbar by editing the registry value. item.title: Download Cheat Engine 7.6.6
item.description: Cheat Engine is a tool designed to help you modify single game games without internet connection so you can make them harder or easier depending on your favorites (e.g. found 100hp too easy, try playing games with max 1 HP), but also contains other useful tools to help debug games and even normal applications.
